summary.primary_behavioral_result: On the canonical sampling scenario, imported trust reduced ROI MAE from 0.17226 for uniform allocation to 0.03184 under the same total budget.

scenarios.headline: Thin-Structure Reveal: imported-trust ROI MAE 0.03184, combined-heuristic ROI MAE 0.04977, uniform ROI MAE 0.17226.
scenarios.bounded_note: Imported trust remains competitive under equal budget on this scenario.

scenarios.headline: Fast Lateral Reveal: imported-trust ROI MAE 0.00220, combined-heuristic ROI MAE 0.00603, uniform ROI MAE 0.00804.
scenarios.bounded_note: Imported trust remains competitive under equal budget on this scenario.

scenarios.headline: Diagonal Subpixel Reveal: imported-trust ROI MAE 0.00770, combined-heuristic ROI MAE 0.01245, uniform ROI MAE 0.01607.
scenarios.bounded_note: Imported trust remains competitive under equal budget on this scenario.

scenarios.headline: Textured Reveal Band: imported-trust ROI MAE 0.00343, combined-heuristic ROI MAE 0.00972, uniform ROI MAE 0.01459.
scenarios.bounded_note: Imported trust remains competitive under equal budget on this scenario.

scenarios.headline: Motion-Bias Reveal Band: imported-trust ROI MAE 0.00974, combined-heuristic ROI MAE 0.01716, uniform ROI MAE 0.03229.
scenarios.bounded_note: Imported trust remains competitive under equal budget on this scenario.

scenarios.headline: Contrast Pulse Stress: imported-trust ROI MAE 0.00008, combined-heuristic ROI MAE 0.00008, uniform ROI MAE 0.00008.
scenarios.bounded_note: Neutral case: guidance is not expected to produce a large win, so non-ROI penalties and concentration behavior matter more than raw ROI gain.

scenarios.headline: Stability Holdout: imported-trust ROI MAE 0.00672, combined-heuristic ROI MAE 0.00363, uniform ROI MAE 0.00672.
scenarios.bounded_note: Neutral case: guidance is not expected to produce a large win, so non-ROI penalties and concentration behavior matter more than raw ROI gain.
